description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-spinner` (T1-09) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, size typed, label/accessible-name typed
2. Accessibility — `role="status"` with aria-label (or aria-live region), decorative mode via aria-hidden, `prefers-reduced-motion` respected, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all sizes, accessible label modes, reduced motion, inline vs page-level use
4. Storybook — all sizes, inline/overlay variants
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, CSS animation (prefers-reduced-motion), CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, animation is CSS only (no JS timer)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-spinner/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-spinner — T1-09 antagonistic quality review
